author: Rhys Gottwald
description: DocDrop is an Obsidian plugin that converts documents, spreadsheets, images, and more into clean, usable Markdown files directly within your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Rhys Gottwald
manifest.description: Convert PDF files to Markdown using Microsofts markitdown CLI.
manifest.name: DocDrop

name: DocDrop

releases.author: FlatulentFowl
releases.description:
DocDrop 1.1.0 Release Notes

  New Features

  - Broad file type support — Plugin now converts all file types supported by markitdown, not
  just a limited subset. Drop any compatible file and it converts.
  - Azure Document Intelligence integration — New OCR backend option for high-accuracy document
  parsing. Configure via expanded plugin settings.
  - MIME type setting — New mimeType configuration option for fine-grained control over file
  handling.

  Improvements

  - Modernized settings UI — Settings panel rebuilt with improved component layout and more
  reliable path resolution.
  - Type safety — File conversion pipeline now strongly typed; reduces runtime errors on
  edge-case file drops.
  - ESLint integration — Codebase now linted; consistent code quality going forward.
  - Automated release workflow — GitHub Actions pipeline for releases added.

  Internal / Housekeeping

  - Dependency updates
  - .gitignore cleanup
  - Version bump to 1.1.0

releases.author: FlatulentFowl
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Refactor settings UI and improve async handling by @FlatulentFowl in https://github.com/FlatulentFowl/docdrop/pull/1
* Claude/replace builtin modules rd h89 by @FlatulentFowl in https://github.com/FlatulentFowl/docdrop/pull/2
* Add release workflow and fix documentation typos by @FlatulentFowl in https://github.com/FlatulentFowl/docdrop/pull/3
* Consolidate release workflow by merging attest and release jobs by @FlatulentFowl in https://github.com/FlatulentFowl/docdrop/pull/4
* Claude/debug persistent error szisk by @FlatulentFowl in https://github.com/FlatulentFowl/docdrop/pull/5
* Remove main.js from gitignore by @FlatulentFowl in https://github.com/FlatulentFowl/docdrop/pull/6

## New Contributors
* @FlatulentFowl made their first contribution in https://github.com/FlatulentFowl/docdrop/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlatulentFowl/docdrop/commits/1.0.0
